mapper.select: SELECT pt.terms_no, pt.product_no, pt.type_no, tt.type_name, pt.required_yn, pt.use_yn, pt.created_dt, ptv.term_version_no, ptv.major_version, ptv.minor_version, ptv.terms_title, ptv.pdf_path, ptv.change_reason, ptv.effective_dt, ptv.expired_dt, ptv.is_current FROM product_terms pt JOIN terms_types tt ON tt.type_no = pt.type_no LEFT JOIN product_term_versions ptv ON ptv.terms_no = pt.terms_no AND ptv.is_current = 'Y' WHERE pt.product_no = #{productNo} ORDER BY pt.terms_no ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_product_terms.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO product_terms ( terms_no, product_no, type_no, required_yn, use_yn, created_dt ) VALUES ( #{termsNo}, #{productNo}, #{typeNo}, #{requiredYn}, NVL(#{useYn}, 'Y'), SYSDATE )
